name: Phunware, Inc.
business: Phunware offers mobile software subscriptions and services including application frameworks, SDKs, cloud-based services, AI-enabled features, development services, and in-app advertising. The company's products support digital engagement, operational workflows, and user experiences for various industries.

exposures.sentence: In October 2024, we announced the commencement of our investment into the field of artificial intelligence (AI).
We continue to invest in AI, including generative AI and agentic AI, and in the integration of AI capabilities into our products and services.
